channel.title: Clay Machine Games
channel.description: Articles on game development, engineering, lore and community from Clay Machine Games.

item.title: Von Null zum Solo-Dev: Stufen, die niemand dir erklärt
item.description: Coding verlernt, keine Erfahrung — und trotzdem kurz vor dem ersten Game-Release. Wie KI-Agenten und ein MVP das möglich gemacht haben.

item.title: The Art of the Claw: Mechanism Deep Dive
item.description: From pneumatic actuators to torque-calibrated grippers — we dissect what separates a winning machine from a decorative one.

item.title: Ancient Golem Figurines: Origins Uncovered
item.description: The clay warriors predate the machine age by millennia. A deep look at the mythology behind our mascot and the art that inspired it.

item.title: Strategy Guide: Maximum Win Rate
item.description: Position, timing, claw tension — a data-driven breakdown of the variables that lead to consistent prize grabs.

item.title: Collector's Corner: Rarest Prizes of 2025
item.description: Limited-run collectibles, blind-box rarities, and the machines that hold them. Our curators rank this year's top finds.

item.title: Machine Mods: Community Builds
item.description: DIY arcade engineers share their wildest custom claw builds — forged steel arms, rune-etched cabinets, and clay-cast prizes.

item.title: The Steel Side: Robotics Meets Arcade
item.description: Industrial robotic arms share more with claw machines than you'd think. We explore the surprisingly narrow gap between factory floor and fun.
